languages.text: {n}Себериан задумчиво склоняет голову.{/n} "Воистину. Видит Бог-Император, я мало тому способствовал, но вы сумели найти способ впечатлить старика".
{n}Seberian bows his head in thought.{/n} "Indeed. The God-Emperor knows I can hardly claim credit for bringing that about, but you found a way to impress an old man."
languages.original_text: {n}Себериан задумчиво склоняет голову.{/n} "Воистину. Видит Бог-Император, я мало тому способствовал, но вы сумели найти способ впечатлить старика".

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian lowers his head in thought.{/n} "Indeed. The God-Emperor knows I can hardly claim credit for bringing that about, but you found a way to impress an old man."

{n}Seberian bows his head in thought.{/n} "Indeed. The God-Emperor knows I can hardly claim credit for bringing that about, but you found a way to impress an old man."

languages.text: {n}Seberian senkt nachdenklich den Kopf.{/n} "In der Tat. Der Gottimperator weiß, ich kann wohl kaum für mich beanspruchen, das bewerkstelligt zu haben, aber Ihr habt es geschafft, einen alten Mann zu beeindrucken."
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian bows his head in thought.{/n} "Indeed. The God-Emperor knows I can hardly claim credit for bringing that about, but you found a way to impress an old man."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian senkt nachdenklich den Kopf.{/n} "In der Tat. Der Gottimperator weiß, ich kann wohl kaum für mich beanspruchen, das bewerkstelligt zu haben, aber Ihr habt es geschafft, einen alten Mann zu beeindrucken."

languages.text: {n}Seberian incline la tête, songeur.{/n} « En effet. L'Empereur-Dieu sait bien que je n'y suis pour rien, mais vous, vous avez réussi à impressionner un vieil homme. »
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian bows his head in thought.{/n} "Indeed. The God-Emperor knows I can hardly claim credit for bringing that about, but you found a way to impress an old man."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian incline la tête, songeur.{/n} « En effet. L'Empereur-Dieu sait bien que je n'y suis pour rien, mais vous, vous avez réussi à impressionner un vieil homme. »

languages.text: {n}Seberian agacha la cabeza, pensativo.{/n} «En efecto. El Dios Emperador sabe que no me corresponde la gloria de haber obtenido ese resultado, pero ha encontrado la forma de impresionar a un veterano».
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian bows his head in thought.{/n} "Indeed. The God-Emperor knows I can hardly claim credit for bringing that about, but you found a way to impress an old man."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian agacha la cabeza, pensativo.{/n} «En efecto. El Dios Emperador sabe que no me corresponde la gloria de haber obtenido ese resultado, pero ha encontrado la forma de impresionar a un veterano».

languages.text: {n}Seberian, düşünceli bir şekilde başını eğiyor.{/n} "Gerçekten de öyle. Tanrı İmparator biliyor ki bunu başarmamda benim pek bir payım yok. Fakat sen yaşlı bir adamı etkilemenin yolunu buldun."
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian bows his head in thought.{/n} "Indeed. The God-Emperor knows I can hardly claim credit for bringing that about, but you found a way to impress an old man."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian, düşünceli bir şekilde başını eğiyor.{/n} "Gerçekten de öyle. Tanrı İmparator biliyor ki bunu başarmamda benim pek bir payım yok. Fakat sen yaşlı bir adamı etkilemenin yolunu buldun."

languages.text: {n}塞贝里安低头沉思。{/n}“确实。神皇在上，我可不能说这是我的功劳，不过你确实让我这个老家伙刮目相看。”
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian bows his head in thought.{/n} "Indeed. The God-Emperor knows I can hardly claim credit for bringing that about, but you found a way to impress an old man."

traits.locale_text: {n}塞贝里安低头沉思。{/n}“确实。神皇在上，我可不能说这是我的功劳，不过你确实让我这个老家伙刮目相看。”

languages.text: {n}セベリアンは考えにふけり頭を下げた。{/n}「確かに。神帝は私がその実現に貢献したとは言えないことを知っているだろうが、あなたは老人に好印象を与えられたようだ。」
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian bows his head in thought.{/n} "Indeed. The God-Emperor knows I can hardly claim credit for bringing that about, but you found a way to impress an old man."

traits.locale_text: {n}セベリアンは考えにふけり頭を下げた。{/n}「確かに。神帝は私がその実現に貢献したとは言えないことを知っているだろうが、あなたは老人に好印象を与えられたようだ。」
